screen.name: mainScreen
screen.instruct: Use the magnifying glass to search the space heater. There are three points of interest.
You still have two points of interest to find.
There is one point of interest left to find.

screen.name: cord1
screen.title: Electrical Cord
screen.text: Zoom in to the electrical cord.
screen.caption: ZOOM

screen.name: cord2
screen.title: Electrical Cord
screen.text:
When an electrical cord is heated over the melting temperature of copper (1,085°C/1,985°F), the wires can melt.
Upon cooling, the molten materials often assumes the shape of a bead.
screen.caption: bead

screen.name: cord3
screen.title: Electrical Cord
screen.text: What is the demarcation of our bead?

screen.name: cord4
screen.title: Electrical Cord
screen.text: The DEMARCATION of the bead is the border between the bead and the cylindrical portion of the wire.
screen.example: Bead caused by an electrical spark, SHARP demarcation
Bead caused by burning from the outside, NO sharp demarcation

screen.name: cord5
screen.title: Electrical Cord
screen.text: What is the demarcation of our bead?
screen.caption: ZOOM
screen.response: Are you sure? The demarcation doesn't look particularly sharp to me.

screen.name: controls2
screen.caption: high
medium
low
ON
OFF
screen.title: Controls
screen.text: Was the heater running when the fire started?
screen.response: Look more closely and try again.
The controls reflect the heater's state at the time of the fire. Try again.
